text:
is an artbook published by Takeshobo on 30 June 2004 for 1,500 yen (excluding tax).

Overview

The book contains photos of figures produced from 1996 to 2004. A total of 400 figures are on display, from commercial figures to amateur works released at events such as Wonder Festival. It includes a business trip manga short story by Kimiko Higuchi. https://web.archive.org/web/20080101032529/http://www.gainax.co.jp/anime/eva/backnum2004.html
